string.text: A hidden stash discovered as a reward for completing zone tasks. Contains weapon attachments and upgrade kits.
A rare hidden stash rewarded for persistence in the Zone. Contains rare kits and high-quality attachments.
Quest Reward Cache - Contains weapon attachments and upgrade kits
~Your persistence in the Zone has been rewarded. A cache with weapon attachments has appeared on your PDA map, marked in blue.
~Word spreads of your achievements in the Zone. A rare supply cache has appeared on your PDA map, marked in blue. It contains kits and premium attachments.
~Quest reward pending. No suitable location found for the cache nearby.
